Statement I is correct but Statement II is incorrect.
Statement I is incorrect but Statement II is correct.
Both Statement I and Statement II are incorrect.

A 1 g sample of Na3AsO4 is heated with an excess amount of solid KI in the presence of concentrated HCl. The iodine formed is collected in KI solution and then titrated with 0.2 N hypo solution. Taking the reaction as

$\mathrm{AsO_4^{3-} + 2H^+ + 2I^- \longrightarrow AsO_3^{3-} + H_2O + I_2}$

find the volume of hypo solution required. [Atomic weight of As = 75]

q:
Consider the reaction given below

A. $3\mathrm{MnO}_4^{2-} + 4\mathrm{H}^+ \longrightarrow 2\mathrm{MnO}_4^- + \mathrm{MnO}_2 + 2\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}$

B. $\mathrm{MnO}_4^- + 4\mathrm{H}^+ + 4\mathrm{e}^- \longrightarrow \mathrm{MnO}_2 + 2\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O}$

C. $10\mathrm{I}^- + 2\mathrm{MnO}_4^- + 16\mathrm{H}^+ \longrightarrow 2\mathrm{Mn}^{2+} + 8\mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O} + 5\mathrm{I}_2$

D. $8\mathrm{MnO}_4^- + 3\mathrm{S}_2\mathrm{O}_3^{2-} + \mathrm{H}_2\mathrm{O} \longrightarrow 8\mathrm{MnO}_2$+ $6\mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} + 2\mathrm{OH}^-$

q:
Consider the following reactions

  1. I. $\mathrm{MnO}_4^{2-}+4 \mathrm{H}^{+} \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+\mathrm{MnO}_2+2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$

II. $\mathrm{MnO}_4^{2-}+4 \mathrm{H}^{+}+4 e^{-} \longrightarrow \mathrm{MnO}_2+2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$

III. $1 \mathrm{OI}^{-}+2 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+16 \mathrm{H}^{+} \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{Mn}^{2+}+8 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}+5 \mathrm{I}_2$

IV. $8 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+3 \mathrm{~S}_2 \mathrm{O}_3^{2-}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow 8 \mathrm{MnO}_2+6 \mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} +2 \mathrm{OH}^{-}$

V. $2 \mathrm{KMnO}_4 \longrightarrow \mathrm{~K}_2 \mathrm{MnO}_4+\mathrm{MnO}_2+\mathrm{O}_2$

VI. $2 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+1 \mathrm{OI}^{-}+16 \mathrm{H}^{+} \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{Mn}^{2+}+5 \mathrm{I}_2+8 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$

VII. $2 \mathrm{CuBr} \longrightarrow \mathrm{CuBr}_2+\mathrm{Cu}$

VIII. $2 \mathrm{NaBr}+\mathrm{Cl}_2 \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{NaCl}+\mathrm{Br}_2$

The total number of disproportionation reaction(s) is/are
question:
Consider the following reactions

  1. I. $\mathrm{MnO}_4^{2-}+4 \mathrm{H}^{+} \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+\mathrm{MnO}_2+2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$

II. $\mathrm{MnO}_4^{2-}+4 \mathrm{H}^{+}+4 e^{-} \longrightarrow \mathrm{MnO}_2+2 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$

III. $1 \mathrm{OI}^{-}+2 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+16 \mathrm{H}^{+} \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{Mn}^{2+}+8 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}+5 \mathrm{I}_2$

IV. $8 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+3 \mathrm{~S}_2 \mathrm{O}_3^{2-}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow 8 \mathrm{MnO}_2+6 \mathrm{SO}_4^{2-} +2 \mathrm{OH}^{-}$

V. $2 \mathrm{KMnO}_4 \longrightarrow \mathrm{~K}_2 \mathrm{MnO}_4+\mathrm{MnO}_2+\mathrm{O}_2$

VI. $2 \mathrm{MnO}_4^{-}+1 \mathrm{OI}^{-}+16 \mathrm{H}^{+} \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{Mn}^{2+}+5 \mathrm{I}_2+8 \mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O}$

VII. $2 \mathrm{CuBr} \longrightarrow \mathrm{CuBr}_2+\mathrm{Cu}$

VIII. $2 \mathrm{NaBr}+\mathrm{Cl}_2 \longrightarrow 2 \mathrm{NaCl}+\mathrm{Br}_2$

The total number of disproportionation reaction(s) is/are
